  context={"endpoint"}

Requires <b>applications.precheck</b> authority for authenticated user

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}

  children={"Request"}

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"OK","content":{"*/*":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["id","recommendation"],"properties":{"id":{"type":"string","description":"Unique identificator of Precheck"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"Custom message for customer"},"recommendation":{"type":"boolean","description":"A recommendation of whether the order should be passed to the HCO"},"result":{"type":"string","description":"Result code","enum":["NEW_CONTRACT","EXISTING_CONTRACT","UNKNOWN","TIME_OUT"]}},"title":"FinancingV2PrecheckResult"}}}},"201":{"description":"Created"},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized"},"403":{"description":"Forbidden"},"404":{"description":"Not Found"}}}
